title: Learn Receipt
description: Receipt envelope returned by the second-brain.learn.v1 capability.

correlation_id.description: Echoes the correlation_id from the originating request.

source_id.description: Provider-assigned stable identifier full SHA-256 hex digest of content (64 hex chars; full 256-bit SHA-256 digest). Present when status is 'accepted' or 'duplicate'; absent when status is 'invalid'. Use as target_id in a future brain-forget request.
